message:
🐛 Fix deprecated npm dependency warnings (#637)

Replace nyc with direct istanbul-lib-* packages to eliminate deprecated
transitive deps (inflight, rimraf@3, glob@7). Add npm override to bump
three-mesh-bvh to v0.8.x within @react-three/drei for three.js compat.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
